name: claude-equity-research
description: Claude Code plugin for institutional-grade equity research. Generates professional buy/sell/hold recommendations with fundamental analysis, technical indicators, and risk assessment. Educational use only - not financial advice.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (315 stars, MIT, created Sep 2025). Contains .claude-plugin/marketplace.json and commands/ directory with trading-ideas.md. No code execution required - purely declarative prompts. SECURITY.md present. Concern: org 'quant-sentiment-ai' has no listed forks (0) despite 315 stars, which is unusual and may indicate star inflation. Financial content classification warrants noting: plugin makes buy/sell recommendations that could mislead users despite disclaimer. Primary language reported as None by GitHub (no code files), all markdown. No malicious patterns found but financial advice risk category applies.
